case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. FRANKSTEVE CORPORATION DBA AMERICLEAN DRY et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-02-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-30-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKSTEVE CORPORATION DBA AMERICLEAN DRY CLEANERS TRAM, MUOI POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $13,895.24 DAMAGES, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $470.00 COSTS, $887.73 INTERESTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,977.97, ** IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF IS THE OWNER OF THE LEASED EQUIPMENT WHICH HAS A FAIR MARKED VALUE OF $6000 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
